praying to Lord Kapila, and how do we get freed from false ego? By taking shelter of the Lord, by pleading to the Lord, by getting strength from the Lord, jnana bala kriya, and when we chant the holy names of the Lord, we get that strength, right now we don't have taste for the holy name, it is very monotonous, mechanical, but acharyas are saying, chant anyway,

take the medicine anyway, it is bitter, take it anyway, and a day will come when we will get cured, and we will start relishing the Lord's holy name, and a day will come when we will get freed from all this false ego, all this anarthas, all this misgivings, and then, as a soul, standing in its true glory, we will experience real sat, chit, and ananda,
